pullRequest.title: DOM-55613  Parameterize individual generated tests in test ai hub e2e

nodes.body: I'm not sure about the default value. In my opinion, it's better to not have a default value so that if some new test is added and it doesn't have an entry in the dict, line 308 will fail. In this way, we can enforce unique testrail ids for test cases
that makes a lot of sense. will update
